testcase.name: registration

failure.message: The following asserts failed: expected [Hello TestNG] but found [Hello], expected [Hello TestNG] but found [Hello]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: expected [Hello TestNG] but found [Hello], expected [Hello TestNG] but found [Hello]
